features.name: packed struct with array of packed struct
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing an array field where the element type is another packed struct
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic a; } inner_t;
typedef struct packed { inner_t [3:0] arr; } outer_t;

features.name: parameterized struct array field
features.description: Code should include a struct with a parameterized array dimension used as a field
features.snippet:
parameter int ARRAY_W = 4;
typedef struct packed { logic [ARRAY_W-1:0] field; } s_t;

features.name: module instance port connection via struct field access
features.description: Code should include a module instance with port connections using dot notation to pass a struct field that is an array

features.name: hierarchical struct member access in port connection
features.description: Code should include connecting a struct field to a module instance port where the struct field is an array of structs defined in a package
